title: Remove tarfile.is_tarfile check in integration test
body:
The test uses memory in place of writing the tarball to disk. This
causes the check to fail. It is not clear why this test ever passed.

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body:
> The test uses memory in place of writing the tarball to disk.

Yeowch!
